(i) The subject's marriage may take place when Venus or
the lord of VII house passes during his transit through the sign

MATRIMONY 193
one trine to it. (ii) Or it may come off when the lord of the
ascendant in transit goes to the Sign which houses the 7th
Bhava. (iii) It is likely to happen during the major period
of the planet (I) posited in the 7th house, (2) aspecting the
7th, or (3) owning the 7th. (iv) Find out the strongest of the
following four planets viz. the Moon, Venus, and the lords of
the sign and ArhSa occupied by the lord of VII house. Marriage
will take place in the major period of that planet and during
the passage of Jupiter through a sign which represents the Rasi
